name: spike-07-accessible-charting
description: THROWAWAY spike (UX2) — proves a hand-rolled SVG chart can pass axe (WCAG 2.2 AA) + keyboard + screen reader with a data-table fallback, in light AND dark, within the 120 KB gz bundle budget. Recharts is installed ONLY to measure its bundle cost as the rejected alternative. Not the V1 app.
